playbook.intent: One post per week that reinforces specialization niche. Done = post published, engagement triaged, follow-up DMs handled within 48h.
playbook.scope: One post per week that reinforces specialization niche. Done = post published, engagement triaged, follow-up DMs handled within 48h.

success-criteria.criterion: Write + publish stage complete: Published post

stage.name: Idea
stage.intent: Pull one niche-anchored idea from this week's work.

tasks.task: Skim weekly notes for tension/insight/contrarian take
Pick one angle tied to your niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when angle is niche-aligned and specific.

stage.name: Write + publish
stage.intent: Ship a post by Wed/Thu morning local time.

tasks.task: Write post (≤300 words for LinkedIn / 5-9 tweets for X)
Publish at peak hour for your audience

stage.decision-gate: Cycle requires publication, not just drafting.

stage.name: Engage
stage.intent: Triage engagement; convert DMs into discovery calls.

tasks.task: Reply to every meaningful comment within 24h
Triage DMs: book call / disqualify / refer

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when DMs are triaged.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content weekly-positioning-post --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-positioning-post --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-positioning-post --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
